para_trans: The peaks established for the planning of Simhastha Kumbh Mela in 2027-2028

Read the government's decision here. Nashik and Trimbakeshwar, District Nashik under 19.09.2025
To set up various committees for the planning of Simhastha Kumbh Mela to be held in 2027-2028.
has been approved. According to the government decision, the summit committee had a total of 40 members.

The designation "Deputy Chief Minister (Finance & Planning)" was replaced by "Deputy Chief Minister (State Excise, Sports & Tourism)."
